items.title: Home Depot & Lowe’s: Buying the Earnings Dip
items.description: Home Depot and Lowe's are pivoting to professional contractors to drive growth while rewarding patient shareholders with reliable and increasing dividends.

items.title: Home Depot (HD) Price Target Raised as Performance Remains Steady
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is included among the 13 Best March Dividend Stocks to Buy. On February 25, Telsey Advisory raised its price recommendation on The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) to $435 from $410. The firm reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The analyst said the company continues to stand out as a […]
